title: Signature Mechanic Game
genericDescription: Identify a personal design strength; build around one memorable mechanic; present it cleanly.
specificDescription: Build a game whose appeal depends on one signature mechanic that can be understood in a short clip. Include a GIF or short capture for portfolio use.
gradingRubric: 30 pts mechanic originality and clarity; 20 pts execution; 20 pts polish; 15 pts portfolio capture; 15 pts reflection.
